metadata.title:
COMPANY REFUSES TO


TREAT WITH THE UNION

pages.raw_text:
All negotiations for a settlement
of the differences existing between
the Washington Water Power com
pany and the electrical workers
union have been called off.


The Washington Water Power
company. through its general man
ager, NJ. A. Huntington. positively
refused TO talk to the committee
from the various labor organiza-
lions which waited upon him yes
terday with a view TO a settlement
of the present trouble.


Mr. Huntington stated that he
would treat with his former en-
ployes as individuals tut that he
nor the company which he repre-
scented would positively refuse to
recognize the union or confer with
any committee from any labor or
ganization which represented the
union.


In view of the fact that the cleo
trical workers have agreed to leave
all questions in dispute to board
of arbitration, the action of the
company can only be explained by
its utilization with the organization
known as the Manufacturers AS
ISOLATION and a bitter antagonism
on the part Of the stockholders Of
the company to organized labor in
